chunks.title: Judgment on Priests and Israel
chunks.reason: A unified oracle addressing priests, the house of Israel, and the king regarding their specific sins and impending judgment.

chunks.title: Call to War and Condemnation of Leaders
chunks.reason: A distinct section calling for alarm in specific cities followed by specific condemnations of Judah's princes and Ephraim's stubbornness.

chunks.title: The Futility of Human Help and Divine Return
chunks.reason: An argumentative section explaining the failure of seeking Assyria and concluding with God's promise to return only after repentance.
